fact_text: NVIDIA management commentary pointed to continued data center accelerator demand.
evidence_title: NVIDIA data center demand remains strong
evidence_summary: This supports the accelerator demand thesis because hyperscaler and enterprise demand appears durable.
notes: Review future commentary for digestion risk.

fact_text: TSMC advanced packaging capacity remained tight due to AI accelerator demand.
evidence_summary: Tight packaging capacity supports the advanced packaging bottleneck thesis.
notes: Watch for capacity expansion timing and yield.

fact_text: Memory pricing improved alongside stronger HBM demand.
evidence_summary: Improving memory pricing supports the thesis that HBM can improve memory supplier mix and margins.

fact_text: Data center power bottlenecks continued to support infrastructure spending.
evidence_summary: Power availability constraints support demand for power and cooling infrastructure vendors.
notes: Review backlog conversion and project timing.

fact_text: Supermicro inventory remained an investor focus despite strong revenue growth.
evidence_summary: Inventory concerns weaken confidence in server platform execution despite AI server demand.
notes: Check whether inventory normalizes over next quarters.

fact_text: Hyperscaler accelerator competition intensified through internal silicon and alternative accelerators.
evidence_title: ASIC and internal silicon competition rises
evidence_summary: This challenges the assumption that all accelerator demand flows to merchant GPU suppliers.
notes: Separate training demand from inference optimization.

fact_text: Broadcom highlighted custom AI silicon wins with large customers.
evidence_title: Custom AI silicon demand remains visible
evidence_summary: Customer wins support the ASIC coexistence thesis.

fact_text: Higher rack power requires more efficient conversion and distribution components.
evidence_title: AI rack power raises component requirements
evidence_summary: Higher power density may support power semiconductor and power shelf demand.
notes: Need direct company exposure evidence for ON Semiconductor and Delta Electronics.
